settings.title: Newsletter
settings.footer_dec: Health is yours when you live in the sunshine, swim in the sea and let the waves hit your feet, while the sand is your seat, drink the wild air...

settings.imgblock_desc:
Beach wear offers spectacular range of swim suits & bikini sets. Whatever be your style, Beach Bikini

fulfills your expectations. From a simple functional swim suit to solid bikini set, Beach Bikini has it all!
